name: Template Pack
description: Copy this folder to packs/<your-pack> (or run `make new-pack name=<your-pack>`) and edit. A pack bundles project-specific skills, agents, MCP servers, and a rulebook fragment that get merged into the active config by `make use-pack`.

requires.notes: List anything the user must install manually (e.g. a CLI, an SDK) so use-pack can warn them.
